title: Yijing Hexagram 27: Yi (Corners of the Mouth)
description: Hexagram 27 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 27 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Corners of the Mouth. Perseverance brings good fortune. Pay heed to the providing of nourishment.
